$evals.prompt: Analyze report turnaround time compliance for our emergency CT studies. What percentage meet the 30-minute target and what factors predict delays?
$evals.expected: Compliance rate, delay predictors, time-of-day patterns, and process improvement recommendations.

$evals.prompt: Review major discrepancies from our double-read program over the past quarter. Categorize by type, body part, and clinical setting.
$evals.expected: Discrepancy categorization, pattern identification, learning points, and peer review focus areas.

$evals.prompt: Audit report completeness for chest CT studies. Check for required elements: clinical indication, technique, comparison studies, findings, and impressions.
$evals.expected: Completeness scores by element, deficiency patterns, template optimization suggestions.

$evals.prompt: Review documentation of critical result communications for pneumothorax and PE findings. Verify proper documentation in RIS and communication logs.
$evals.expected: Communication compliance rate, documentation gaps, escalation protocol adherence.

$evals.prompt: Identify all preliminary reports still awaiting attending sign-off older than 2 hours. Prioritize by clinical urgency and alert appropriate radiologists.
$evals.expected: Pending report list with urgency ranking, escalation pathway, and resolution tracking.

$evals.prompt: Verify report attribution accuracy by comparing final signatures in PACS against RIS sign-off logs. Identify any attribution mismatches.
$evals.expected: Mismatch report with affected studies, root cause analysis, and system synchronization recommendations.

$evals.prompt: Compare diagnostic accuracy and clinical utility between structured template reports and free-text reports for CT abdomen studies.
$evals.expected: Comparative analysis with accuracy metrics, clinician satisfaction indicators, and template adoption recommendations.

$evals.prompt: Design a continuous quality improvement project for reducing addendum rates. Track why addenda are created and identify preventable causes.
$evals.expected: CQI framework with baseline metrics, contributing factors, intervention recommendations, and success metrics.
